headline: Shares of oil and gas-related companies are trading lower as Iranian and U.S. comments indicating that the Strait of Hormuz is open for passage is weighing on oil prices.
summary: Shares of oil and gas-related companies are trading lower as Iranian and U.S. comments indicating that the Strait of Hormuz is open for passage is weighing on oil prices.
